chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.24 of 2024 Mst. Sadia Shaikh Versus Muhammad Naveed Chaudhary Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. Dated: 23.04.2024 Malik Muhammad Ejaz for appellant. -.-.- Impugned in this appeal is order dated 13.12.2023 in terms whereof suit of the plaintiff/appellant was dismissed on the sole ground of non-payment of Court fee. We have heard the counsel and perused record. Admittedly the plaint was presented without affixing Court fee. Per learned counsel numerous chances were given but all in vain as up until passing of the impugned order, the Court fee was not affixed. The appeal is presented solely on the ground that the counsel was engaged in election process of bar association and hence could not comply the direction as to deposit of Court fee. This could hardly be a ground as appellant/litigant himself has to be vigilant. Even otherwise this is not a plausible ground to be considered by this Bench. In view of above, we do not find any reason to interfere in the impugned order and consequently this appeal merits no consideration and is accordingly dismissed. Judge Judge
